title: Vapeaholic (Fabric)
description: Adds Vapes that can be used for short bursts of potion effects!
body:
*This Mod Is Still In Development*

# Vapeaholic

This mod adds Vapes that can be used with a variety of potions!

There are 16 different colors that you can dye your Vape!

All Curently Available Potion Types:

- Fire Resistance
- Instant Damage
- Instant Health
- Invisibility
- Jump Boost
- Luck
- Night Vision
- Poison
- Regeneration
- Slow Falling
- Slowness
- Strength
- Swiftness
- Turtle Master
- Water Breathing
- Weakness
- Wither

Water Pods can also be inserted into a Vape if you don't want any potion effects!

# Simple Guide to Vapeaholic

Needed Components:

- Mouthpiece

![Mouthpiece Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bd465bb27d05ab13d54b3105c6445f0c7e967e0.png)

- Coil

![Coil Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90d53f6aa5b71663c1da6abead9d5be09c7ec648.png)

- Battery

![Battery Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a3f169edbe7062da81a28c1e67606c0bd867679.png)

# Assembly

**Vape Recipe:**

![Vape Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7aea12cedaa1fc85735f53703486f682863aeddd.png)

**Vape Pod Recipe:**

![Vape Pod Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf66ee22815777e32b56799b85842082ff1b9067.png)

**Water Pod Recipe:**

![Water Pod Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11547445c2beaf7b9df6d8ad13fcb529e90fb916.png)

The potions are brewed the same way as vanilla Minecraft, but instead using Vape Pods in Crafting table!

**Insterting Vape Pods:**

To use a Vape Pod in a Vape, put the desired pod next to your Vape in a Crafting table.

**Ex:**

![Insterting a Vape Pod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c93b4a7f9306162ac060e86de09a1741d4e38cba.png)

Have Fun!
